_comment: QA baseline experiment for Kimi K2.6 on DashScope OpenAI-compatible mode. Set OPENAI_BASE_URL=https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1, OPENAI_API_KEY or DASHSCOPE_API_KEY copied to OPENAI_API_KEY, and LLM_API_MODE=chat_completions.

qa.images_dir: data/Use Case 2 - Drawing Understanding/01 - Full Dataset/images
qa.labels_dir: data/Use Case 2 - Drawing Understanding/01 - Full Dataset/labels

judge._comment: Uses the same model as judge by default for isolated provider experiments.
